name: John Naughton
blurb: Observer columnist and Cambridge academic (technology & society). Techno-skeptical, pro-democracy, historically minded. His daily 'commonplace book' has run since 2002.

name: Cory Doctorow
blurb: Author and activist; writes Pluralistic on monopoly, platform power and 'enshittification' (a term he coined). Added via RSS — recent posts onward.
